mapper.update: UPDATE doc_node SET draft_name_key = CONCAT('#deleted#', id), published_name_key = CASE WHEN published_name_key IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CONCAT('#deleted#', id) END, is_deleted = 1, deletor_id = #{deletorId}, delete_time = #{deleteTime} WHERE id = #{nodeId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id, parent_id, node_type, draft_name, draft_name_key, published_name, published_name_key, sort_order, node_version, creator_id, create_time, updator_id, update_time FROM doc_node WHERE node_type = 'DOCUMENT' AND is_deleted = 0 AND published_name_key LIKE CONCAT('%', #{escapedKeyword}, '%') ESCAPE '\\' ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
